candidates.description: drone reveal over mountain ridge at sunrise
subject walks along trail through pine forest
wave breaks over coastal rocks at sunset
subject pours coffee from thermos at campsite

assignments.rationale: hook_score 7.8 — highest in pool, drone reveal opens with curiosity, energy 7.2 matches slot target 7.0

meta.notes: Five-slot variety stress test. shot-5 (tripod) is LEFT UNUSED — it's a defensible broll alternative but its description duplicates the framing motion of shot-1 (both involve camera-as-subject). Tests adjacent-slot variety (forest → coast → coffee, no scene-noun duplicates) and the rank-1 rule (shot-1's 7.8 hook beats shot-6's 6.0 for the hook slot, even though shot-6's energy is closer).
